placeholders.description: Describe your situation and anything relevant

onboarding.title: Welcome to Blawby
onboarding.subtitle: A quick setup gets you started.

step1.title: Tell us about you
step1.subtitle: We'll use this to personalize your experience.
step1.termsAgreement: By clicking "Continue" you agree to our <termsLink>Terms</termsLink> and acknowledge our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.

step2.title: What will you use Blawby for?
step2.subtitle: This shapes the suggestions we surface.

askAway.title: Ask away
askAway.description: Blawby can answer legal questions, explain concepts, review documents, and more.

privacy.title: Don't share sensitive info
privacy.description: Chat history may be reviewed to improve our service. Learn more in our <helpCenterLink>Help Center</helpCenterLink>.

accuracy.title: Check the facts
accuracy.description: Blawby can be wrong. It's not legal advice.

lawyer.title: Welcome back
lawyer.subtitle: Set up your practice to start receiving and managing client intakes.

client.title: Your legal portal
client.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your case, in one secure place.

messaging.title: Message your lawyers
messaging.description: Talk directly with your legal team. Ask questions, share updates.

matters.title: Manage your case
matters.description: Find documents, see milestones, and track progress.

payments.title: Pay securely
payments.description: Pay retainers and invoices through Stripe.

businessWelcome.title: Welcome to your business practice
businessWelcome.subtitle: Your organization is ready. Here are the tools at your fingertips:

intake.title: Client intake
intake.description: Share your public link to accept intake forms and capture new leads.

messaging.title: Client messaging
messaging.description: Message clients directly to keep them in the loop on their case.

matters.title: Matter management
matters.description: Organize case details, store documents, and track milestones in one workspace.

billing.title: Billing and finance
billing.description: Set up billing plans and manage payments and payouts through Stripe.

consultation.title: Need to speak to a lawyer?
consultation.description: Share a few details and we'll connect you with the right attorney.

matter.title: Select a matter
matter.description: Pick a matter from the list to see its details.

matterEmpty.title: No matters yet
matterEmpty.description: Create your first matter to start tracking progress and milestones.

invoice.title: Select an invoice
invoice.description: Pick an invoice from the list to see details.

invoiceEmpty.title: No invoices yet
invoiceEmpty.description: Create your first invoice to get started.

error.title: Practice details unavailable
error.description: Couldn't load the name and logo for practice "{{slug}}". Refresh, or contact the practice to confirm their public settings.

chat.publicIntro: Ask anything, or share your feedback.
chat.provideContactDetails: Share a few contact details to start.

attachments.disabled: Chat attachments are off right now.

disclaimer.title: Legal disclaimer
disclaimer.description: This conversation is not legal advice. Accept the terms of use to continue.

contact.matterMessage: Tell us about your case. We'll follow up shortly.

intake.authDescription: Create a free account to finish your intake and get updates from {{practice}}. We'll email you a confirmation link.
intake.authDescriptionFallback: Create a free account to finish your intake and get updates. We'll email you a confirmation link.
